description: Tasks template for PhotoAlbum cloud modernization plan.

tasks.description: Migrate PhotoAlbum photo file operations from local disk storage to Azure Blob Storage.
tasks.reason: The application currently stores photo binaries in local file paths, which limits cloud scalability and portability. Migrating to Azure Blob Storage aligns storage with cloud-native hosting and centralized durability.
tasks.requirements: Migrate upload, retrieval, and deletion flows so photo binaries are stored and served from Azure Blob Storage while preserving existing user-visible behavior and metadata persistence. Use Azure-native authentication for storage access and keep current validation behavior (file type, size, and metadata extraction).

tasks.description: Scan project dependencies for known CVEs and remediate vulnerabilities.
tasks.reason: Dependency vulnerabilities can introduce exploitable risks during and after modernization. Security remediation is required in every modernization plan before deployment.
tasks.requirements: Scan all project dependencies for known CVEs and upgrade vulnerable dependencies to minimum patched versions. If any fix requires a major version bump, document impacted packages and breaking-change risk, then verify the project builds and tests pass after remediation.
tasks.environmentConfiguration: .NET SDK and project runtime established in repository build environment.
